discussion.tldr: Quiet day dominated by the crypto pullback. BTC broke under $60k toward the 49–50k psychological zone; Zero flagged BTC 44/45 (sweeping the Aug-2024 low) as his first point of interest and confirmed a ~10% hard-stop trim on his spot DOGE bag after price closed below demand — then fielded a stream of questions about it. On stocks, members floated NKE, Fresh Del Monte (FDP, an old Zero long), Salesforce (CRM), XPEV and MRNA, with Zero noting an 'important day for Netflix.' Alt chatter centred on TAO and INJ levels.

topics.summary: BTC broke under $60k; EJ is eyeing the 49–50k psychological zone, noting 'nothing in the mid-50ks except frontrunning 50k.' Zero: BTC 44/45, sweeping the August 2024 low, is his first point of interest.

topics.topic: Zero trims DOGE spot — 10% hard stop
topics.summary: Zero cut ~10% of his spot DOGE bag after price closed below demand (hard stop hit), looking to re-long from a multi-month level if in confluence. Several members (Gtje, dindoobs, CATSU11, Dheerane) asked for clarification; the dashboard update was still pending.

Members surfaced setups: Spaceloonie on NKE ('time to pay attention'), Sergio resurfacing Fresh Del Monte (Zero's old long — Zero: 'nice one!'), AlexBThomsen entering half into CRM near 2022/23 lows, VittyJJ/AlexBThomsen on XPEV ~11.5–11.6, KonigNeit naming MRNA. Zero: 'important day for Netflix.'

Iwwa24k posted TAO (a good play if it lines up with USDT/BTC; demand ~140–160 box, current ~210, resistance ~297) and INJ (current ~4.39, supply 5.12–5.51, demand ~3.54). EJ agreed the TAO setup is 'totally possible.'

F25 reflected on exiting a BTC scalp early near the 59.8k SFP; M argued a high success rate matters more than RR, while EJ shared his approach to fading sweeps and waiting for value before committing to a forming range.

ideas.name: Nike, Inc.
ideas.note: Flagged NKE — 'time to pay attention.' Daily chart shows an entry zone ~45 with a gap above toward 48–50, 3D CBOB / $$$ extreme reclaim in play.

ideas.note: Resurfaced Fresh Del Monte (Del Monte) as Zero's old long — Zero acknowledged 'nice one!' 2W chart: 2W/4W BB support ~25.64, fib retrace zone ~26–32, price ~28.2.

ideas.name: Salesforce, Inc.
ideas.note: Entered half of planned position into Salesforce (CRM), sitting at 2022/23 levels close to the low.
